title: Notion vs Todoist
description: Compare Notion vs Todoist in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right productivity tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Notion emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.7/5 rating compared to 4.5/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Notion or Todoist?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Notion edges ahead with a 4.7/5 rating. Notion excels at Notion combines note-taking, documentation, knowledge base management, and proje, while Todoist is stronger for Task management platform with smart scheduling and organization..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Notion and Todoist?
faqs.answer: Notion and Todoist differ in pricing (Free – $18/mo per user vs $5-8/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Notion cheaper than Todoist?
faqs.answer: Notion starts at Free – $18/mo per user while Todoist starts at $5-8/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Notion or Todoist?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for productivity. Notion scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Notion and Todoist together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Notion or Todoist?
faqs.answer: Both Notion and Todoist prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which productivity tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Todoist for large teams, while Notion may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $18/mo per user pricing.
